channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Bichi First FC wins on penalties to reach Kano FA Cup final
item.description: Bichi First Football Club triumphed 4-2 in a penalty shootout against Kano Pillars to secure a spot in the 2026 Kano FA Cup final. The highly competitive semifinal match, played on April 25, 2026, saw...

item.title: JMielle shares thoughts on pressure, teamwork, and personal traits in a fun interview
item.description: In an entertaining segment of Kapamilya Chat, JMielle, the grand winner of 'Your Face Sounds Familiar Season 4', opened up about her personal traits, the pressure of her career, and how she values tea...

item.title: Makinde cautions opposition over one-party state concerns and urges unity
item.description: Governor Seyi Makinde of Oyo State has warned that Nigeria may gradually drift into a one-party state if opposition parties continue to remain divided and unable to present strong alternatives to the ...

item.title: Truck Accident in Marikina Claims Two Lives and Injures Five
item.description: A tragic traffic incident occurred along A. Bonifacio Avenue in Barangay Barangka, Marikina, resulting in two fatalities and five injuries. According to Col. Jenny Tecson, city police chief, a truck c...

item.title: Metropolitan Police uses AI tool to identify misconduct among officers
item.description: The Metropolitan Police has launched investigations into hundreds of officers after deploying an artificial intelligence system developed by Palantir to analyse internal data and detect misconduct. Th...

item.title: iFani reflects on homelessness and musical comeback after TikTok revival of ‘Shake’
item.description: South African rapper iFani has opened up about his return to music following a decade-long absence marked by homelessness and personal reflection. The 40-year-old artist, best known for his 2013 hit “...

item.title: ANC Requires Members to Choose Between Campaigning for ANC or SACP Amid Local Elections
item.description: The African National Congress (ANC) has instructed its members who are also affiliated with the South African Communist Party (SACP) to declare within ten days which party they will be supporting in t...

item.title: Government Urges Unity and Support for President Samia Following Election Unrest
item.description: Following the submission of the Presidential Commission report on the October 29, 2025 election unrest, Tanzanian leaders and analysts are calling for national unity and reconciliation. Ambassador Laz...

item.title: Assessing the Artemis II Moon Flyby and Its Implications
item.description: The Artemis II mission, conducted from April 1 to April 11, 2026, marked the first crewed Moon flyby in over fifty years. While lauded as a milestone in space exploration, the mission has been critici...

item.title: Guide to Viewing the Total Solar Eclipse on August 12, 2026
item.description: On August 12, 2026, a total solar eclipse will be visible across parts of the Arctic Ocean, Greenland, Iceland, Spain, and a small region of northern Portugal. Many European countries, including the U...

item.title: Opposition Parties Agree on Joint Presidential Candidate and Election Concerns
item.description: On Saturday, April 25, 2026, opposition political parties met in Ibadan, Oyo State, for a national summit to deliberate on key issues ahead of the 2027 general elections. The Peoples Democratic Party ...

item.title: Prince Harry Defends His Role Despite Critics
item.description: Prince Harry, the Duke of Sussex, recently addressed critics who question his position within the Royal Family. He was speaking after an ITV interview where he firmly rejected claims that he is 'not a...

item.title: Ina Raymundo's son Jacob working towards his dream of joining Major League Baseball
item.description: Ina Raymundo, the well-known Filipino actress and model, recently shared that her son, Jacob, is following his dream of making it into Major League Baseball (MLB). The 18-year-old, who has shown a kee...

item.title: Choosing the Best Time to Downsize Your Home for Retirement
item.description: Deciding when to downsize a home is a significant choice for many Canadians as they age. While some prefer to remain in their family homes, practical considerations such as health, maintenance, and li...

item.title: Pakistan launches EO-3 earth observation satellite with advanced imaging and AI capabilities
item.description: Pakistan has successfully launched its indigenous electro-optical satellite, EO-3, from China’s Taiyuan Satellite Launch Centre, marking a key development in the country’s growing space programme. Acc...

item.title: Iran rejects maximalist demands as Pakistan leads peace efforts in the conflict
item.description: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araqchi has clearly outlined the country's stance on the ongoing conflict as peace talks take place in Islamabad. The meeting, which included discussions with Pakistan’s ...

item.title: Investigation into the Disappearances of US Scientists and Related Speculations
item.description: Recent reports of the disappearances and deaths of at least 11 US scientists, many with backgrounds in space, defence, and nuclear research, have sparked a wave of conspiracy theories in the United St...

item.title: Social media influencer killed in collision outside Soho nightclub
item.description: Klaudia Zakrzewska, a 32-year-old social media influencer from Essex, has tragically died following a collision with a car outside a nightclub on Argyll Street in Soho, central London, at 04:30 BST on...

item.title: President Samia Takes Steps to Promote Unity and Accountability in Tanzania
item.description: Few days after the Presidential Commission on the October 29, 2025 General Election unrest released its report, Ambassador Lazaro Nyalandu, former Minister for Natural Resources and Tourism, said the ...

item.title: Pick n Pay tests ‘GO’ convenience store format in high-traffic South African locations
item.description: Pick n Pay has started piloting a new convenience store format, called Pick n Pay GO, in South Africa after seeing encouraging results from its earlier rollout in Botswana. The concept is designed to ...
